stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What must the pilot be particularly careful about in the current situation?

options.a: The autopilot could capture the glideslope before the localiser and commence descent outside of the protected area.
options.b: The Flight Director is in VOR/LOC but the autopilot is in Heading mode.
options.c: The autopilot could capture the localiser before the glideslope and commence a turn outside of the protected area.
options.d: The Flight Director is in Heading mode, but the autopilot is in VOR/LOC.
